title: wedelia strigosa
intro: Wedelia strigosa, also known as the Striped Wedelia or Yellow Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia strigosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health. Wedelia strigosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
